rationale: Educ. Code §18.009 governs Job Corps training program operating costs and is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemptions. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 18.009. COSTS. (a) A Job Corps training program shall pay the cost of operating its diploma program.
_note: Rule text concerns Job Corps program costs; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
